message:
feat(tldr): add GitHub star count fetching for tool cards

Adds a build-time script that fetches GitHub star counts for each TL;DR
flywheel tool and caches the results in a JSON data file for display on
tool cards.

- scripts/fetch-tldr-stars.ts (99 lines): fetches star counts from GitHub
  API for all configured tool repos, writes to lib/data/tldr-tool-stars.json
- lib/data/tldr-tool-stars.json: cached star counts keyed by tool name
- lib/content.ts: integrate star count data into tool card content pipeline
- package.json: add fetch-tldr-stars script entry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@
     "build": "rm -rf .next && next build",
     "build:with-stats": "bun run update-stats && rm -rf .next && next build",
     "update-stats": "bun run scripts/update-stats.ts",
+    "fetch-tldr-stars": "bun run scripts/fetch-tldr-stars.ts",
     "start": "next start",
     "lint": "eslint",
     "test": "vitest run",
